items.title: Victorian MPs take plunge for Neale Daniher's FightMND Big Freeze fundraiser
items.summary: State government and opposition MPs take the plunge to raise tens of thousands of dollars for motor neurone disease research just days after Neale Daniher's state funeral.

items.summary: Sir Keir Starmer says he will ban social media sites for under-16s and impose restrictions on gaming and live streaming platforms in some of the most far-reaching online restrictions globally.

items.title: Cairns man charged after allegedly naming prominent Queenslander in extortion case

items.summary: A man who was charged after a fire near Mount Gambier will still have to appear in court to face harm, theft and offensive language charges.

items.summary: A four-week coronial inquest into the death of a 24-year-old man who died in a Coles supermarket in Alice Springs last year after being restrained by police officers has been set down for April 2027.

items.title: Police charge two men after improvised gun discoveries in SA

items.title: NT government introduces new air quality testing plan, including measuring carcinogenic emissions
items.summary: The Northern Territory government has announced a plan to introduce new air quality monitoring of toxic pollutants, including any carcinogenic emissions. It follows a review that found gas giant Inpex had underestimated its emissions in Darwin.

items.title: Former AFL footballer Nick Stevens jailed over $170k Mildura pool fraud
items.summary: An ex-footballer has been locked up after a jury found him guilty of defrauding multiple families with his regional pool business.

items.title: South Australian community, family reacts to Nestory Irankunda's World Cup goal
items.summary: The family and community of Socceroos star Nestory Irankunda are "very emotional" after his goal-scoring World Cup debut. His cousin says he will be "forever grateful" for the support the family received after arriving in Australia, and "their blessing is seeing this at the big stage".

items.summary: Newcastle residents and authorities condemn a clothing company stunt that degenerated into a "riot" involving dozens of dirt bike riders.

items.title: Why Cameron Munster is always Queensland's State of Origin saviour

items.summary: Pat Beach became a surprise national hero with his performance against Türkiye, while incumbent goalkeeper Mat Ryan watched from the bench. Mark Schwarzer has experienced both sides of that coin.

items.summary: Environmentalists and First Nations groups say a new mining agreement with BHP does not do enough to end water extraction from the Great Artesian Basin. But the SA government says the agreement imposes stricter environmental regulation.

items.summary: Nestory Irankunda's childhood hero is none other than Tim Cahill. So it was fitting that more than 20 years after Cahill's famous celebration, this generation's Socceroos hero paid tribute.
